content.memory: The user asked the AI how to make a refreshing Gin Tonic. The AI suggested using London Dry Gin, adding tonic water and ice, squeezing a lime wedge, and garnishing with rosemary.
The user asked the AI how to configure a multi-page application with Vite. The AI suggested configuring build.rollupOptions.input in vite.config.js and setting multiple entry points.

The user consulted the AI about how to quickly relieve dry and tired eyes. The AI suggested looking into the distance every 20 minutes, using artificial tears, and adjusting screen brightness and color temperature.

The user consulted the AI on how to apply for software copyright to protect his mini-program. The AI instructed him to prepare source code and instructions, and submit the application through the official website of the copyright center.

The user asked the AI how to choose an entry-level electric guitar. The AI recommended entry models from Squier or Yamaha, with low-power practice amplifiers, and paying attention to guitar adjustment.
The user asked the AI how to configure a reverse proxy server with Nginx. The AI suggested setting proxy_pass in the configuration file, adjusting proxy buffering and header information.

The user told the AI that he helped a colleague solve a tricky bug today and felt a strong sense of accomplishment. The AI praised his strong technical skills and said sharing knowledge could consolidate his own learning.

The user told the AI that he replaced the keycaps on his mechanical keyboard today with retro gray-white color scheme, and the feel was good. The AI said changing keycaps was the fun of keyboard customization, and different materials could be tried.

The user said he had been watching the anime Oshi no Ko recently, and the first episode was shocking. The AI said the work had a climax at the beginning, and the subsequent revenge line was also very attractive.

The user said he had been watching the One Piece live-action series recently and felt it was better than expected. The AI replied that Netflix's production standard was good with high restoration, and suggested he watch classic clips from the original work.

The user confided in the AI that he felt friends were distancing themselves recently and felt a bit lonely. The AI suggested taking the initiative to meet friends, and it might be overthinking; he could join more social activities.

The user told the AI that he broke through 80 kilograms in bench press at the gym today; it was tough but he made it. The AI congratulated him and reminded him to pay attention to protection, preferably with a spotter.

The user said he had been learning to make Hong Kong-style milk tea recently, but the tea flavor was never strong enough. The AI suggested using Ceylon black tea blend, pulling tea at least four times, and mixing with evaporated milk.

The user said he had been learning to make Mille-feuille recently, but the puff pastry always layered poorly. The AI suggested making the pastry with ice water, fully relaxing after each folding, and pressing the baking tray to prevent bubbling during baking.

The user asked the AI how to choose entry-level massage gun heads. The AI recommended a universal round head, a U-shaped head for relaxing both sides of the spine, and a flat head for massaging large muscle groups.

The user confided in the AI that he had been criticized by his leader today and felt low. The AI comforted him that setbacks were inevitable in the workplace, suggested reviewing the problem, communicating proactively, and taking criticism as an opportunity for growth.

The user told the AI that he tried making Korean fried chicken today, and the sweet-spicy sauce tasted authentic. The AI said fried chicken needed to be fried twice to be crispy, and the sauce should be made with Korean chili paste, tomato sauce and minced garlic.
The user asked the AI how to choose an entry-level spinning bike APP. The AI recommended Zwift and Peloton, which had rich virtual riding and course content and could increase exercise fun.

The user told the AI that he wrote a simple smart contract with Solidity today and deployed it to the test network. The AI congratulated him on stepping into Web3 development and reminded him to pay attention to security audits and gas optimization.

The user told the AI that he generated a dynamic video with Pika today and the effect was smooth. The AI said AI video generation was advancing rapidly, and camera movement descriptions could be added to prompts for better results.

The user said he had been watching the anime Shangri-La Frontier recently, and the game world setting was very appealing. The AI said the monster design and combat system in this work were interesting, and player interactions were realistic.

The user told the AI that he built a personal note system with Obsidian today, and the bidirectional links were very useful. The AI said Obsidian was suitable for building knowledge networks and could achieve many functions with plugins.

The user asked the AI how to quickly edit interview videos with Premiere Pro. The AI suggested synchronizing multi-camera footage first, locating wonderful content with markers, and using automatic subtitle recognition followed by correction.

The user said he had been following the anime Muscle Mage recently, and Mash's fists were extremely satisfying. The AI responded that the contrast between magic and muscles in this work was very creative, and the battle scenes were passionate.

The user told the AI that he wrote a custom directive with Vue3 today to implement button permission control, making the code much more elegant. The AI praised him for using advanced framework features, improving maintainability.

The user asked the AI how to quickly develop a blog website with Django. The AI recommended using Django's built-in admin management, combining class-based views and template system for rapid construction.

The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the calculation law of square area is different from our universe, its formula is: S = P × a, where P is square perimeter, a is square side length.

The user said he had been practicing back extensions recently and felt soreness in his lower back. The AI suggested adjusting the height of the Roman chair, not overextending the movement, and avoiding excessive lumbar arching.

The user asked the AI what to do if the water temperature of his tankless water heater was unstable. The AI analyzed that it might be due to a faulty water flow sensor or gas pressure fluctuation, and suggested professional maintenance.

The user told the AI that he helped his cousin fix the joystick drift on his game controller by replacing it with a Hall sensor joystick. The AI said Hall joysticks were more durable than carbon film ones, and attention should be paid to static protection during soldering.
